title: ImportFont Property
description: Runs a file dialog from the Vision Guide GUI that allows you to import a font file.
notes:
Use the ImportFont property to import a font file that has been previously exported with the ExportFont property.  You can import font files created in any project.

Point-and-Click and SPEL Language Support

The ImportFont property is only available from the Vision Guide point and click interface (in the Object Tab).

See Also: ImportFont Property

ExportFont Property
